attachment_text: Maruti Suzuki India Limited has informed the Exchange that: "Car market leader Maruti Suzuki India Limited sold 58,401 vehicles in the domestic market in December 2007". A copy of the press release in this regard dated January 02, 2008 shall be available on the NSE website (http://www.nseindia.com) under: Corporates > Latest Announcements and on the Extranet Server (/Common/Corporate Announcements). For more details click here.
